title: SquadTask v1
description: Canonical schema for a SquadTask — the atomic unit of work tracked by the Squad Service. Tasks are owned by a squad, transition through a defined status lifecycle, carry an optional bounty in integer micros, and may express dependency relationships via blocked_by / blocks arrays.

schema_version.description: SquadTask schema version this instance conforms to.

id.description: Globally unique task identifier: UUID v4 or constrained slug.

squad_id.description: ID of the squad that owns this task.

priority.description: Task priority tier — maps to model selection and token budget.

assignee.description: Agent ID or human handle that has claimed this task.

skill_id.description: ID of the matched skill to execute this task.

project.description: Project slug this task belongs to.

labels.description: Free-form labels for routing, filtering, and conductance tracking.

blocked_by.description: IDs of tasks this task is blocked by (dependencies).

blocks.description: IDs of tasks this task blocks (downstream dependents).

inputs.description: Free-form input bag: fuel_grade, impact, urgency, cost, estimated_cost_cents, model, etc.

result.description: Output produced by the executing agent on completion.

token_budget.description: Maximum tokens allocated to execute this task. 0 = auto-estimate.

bounty.description: Bounty metadata. reward is denominated in MIND tokens; bounty_id links to the BountyBoard.

bounty_micros.description: Integer micros (1e-6 MIND) reward value for completing this task. 0 = no bounty.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the task was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the task was last modified.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the task reached done/failed/canceled.

claimed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when an agent first claimed this task.

attempt.description: Monotonically increasing attempt counter used for idempotent claims. Starts at 0.
